commands.summary: Initialize the template for a named project.
Install repository git hooks into .git/hooks.
Run repository health checks and report missing setup.
Run the harness-specific lint suite.
Run structural tests for required files, docs, and runtime behavior.
Run drift, orphan, and consistency scans.
Run documentation freshness and link checks and write a docs report.
Compute the current repository quality score and write a quality report artifact.
Run the active observability profile health check, if one is configured.
Search configured observability log files for matching lines.
Run the fast local validation suite.
Run the full validation suite, including harness runtime regression tests.
Report discovery status and current question packet.
Reset discovery and rewrite the docs back to guided-question mode.
Synchronize milestones and tasks after docs become executable.
Render a derived machine-readable summary of the current harness state.
Prepare the next task contract and handoff artifact.
Evaluate the active task, including structured gates, and write fresh evaluation and handoff artifacts.
Run the machine-readable self-review checklist over the current diff and write a review report.
List or recover state snapshots created before state mutations.
Unblock a stuck task and reset its stall counter.
Allocate milestone worktrees when the backlog and git state allow it.
Merge a completed milestone branch back into the main worktree.
